samples.xml_description:
<module id="traffic_light">
    <description>Implement a traffic light with red, yellow, green indicators and a pedestrian button. In normal traffic light operation, the east-west (EW) light should have a 60-clock cycle period, with 5-clock cycle periods of yellow and 10-clock cycle periods of red. The north-south (NS) light should have a 60-clock cycle period, with 5-clock cycle periods of yellow and 10-clock cycle periods of red. When the pedestrian button is pressed, if the remaining EW green time is greater than 10 clocks, force it to be 10 clocks. If the remaining EW green time is less than 10 clocks, do not change the remaining time. The EW and NS lights are paired: when the EW light is green, the NS light is red; when the EW light is yellow, the NS light is red; when the EW light is red, the NS light is green.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="pass_request">Pedestrian button input.</input>
        <output id="red">Red output signal.</output>
        <output id="yellow">Yellow output signal.</output>
        <output id="green">Green output signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="idle">Idle state.</enum>
        <enum id="s1_red">State 1: red.</enum>
        <enum id="s2_yellow">State 2: yellow.</enum>
        <enum id="s3_green">State 3: green.</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic id="state">
            <description>State transition logic.</description>
            <switch>
                <case id="idle">Transition to s1_red.</case>
                <case id="s1_red">Transition to s3_green after a count of 5.</case>
                <case id="s2_yellow">Transition to s1_red after a count of 5.</case>
                <case id="s3_green">Transition to s2_yellow after a count of 10.</case>
            </switch>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="cnt">
            <description>Counter logic.</description>
            <switch>
                <case id="idle">Set to 10.</case>
                <case id="s1_red">Set to 10 if pass_request is active and green is high; set to 60 if green is low.</case>
                <case id="s2_yellow">Set to 5 if yellow is low.</case>
                <case id="s3_green">Set to 10 if red is low.</case>
            </switch>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <description>Reset state to idle. Update state and cnt on positive edge of clk or negative edge of rst_n. Update red, yellow, green on positive edge of clk or negative edge of rst_n.</description>
        <![CDATA[
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                state <= idle;
            end else begin
                case (state)
                    idle: begin
                        state <= s1_red;
                    end
                    s1_red: begin
                        if (cnt == 5) begin
                            state <= s3_green;
                        end else begin
                            state <= s1_red;
                        end
                    end
                    s2_yellow: begin
                        if (cnt == 5) begin
                            state <= s1_red;
                        end else begin
                            state <= s2_yellow;
                        end
                    end
                    s3_green: begin
                        if (cnt == 10) begin
                            state <= s2_yellow;
                        end else begin
                            state <= s3_green;
                        end
                    end
                endcase
            end
        end
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                cnt <= 10;
            end else begin
                if (pass_request && green) begin
                    cnt <= 10;
                end else if (!green) begin
                    cnt <= 60;
                end else if (!yellow) begin
                    cnt <= 5;
                end else if (!red) begin
                    cnt <= 10;
                end else begin
                    cnt <= cnt - 1;
                end
            end
        end
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                red <= 0;
                yellow <= 0;
                green <= 0;
            end else begin
                red <= p_red;
                yellow <= p_yellow;
                green <= p_green;
            end
        end
        ]]></implementation>
    </module>
